inline_comments: Decide which session bucket to use (per-sender vs global).
Resolve the session key with a canonical direct-chat bucket (default: "main"). All non-group direct chats collapse to this bucket; groups stay isolated.

functions.name: deriveSessionKey
functions.doc: Decide which session bucket to use (per-sender vs global).
